meaning: n.(装液体的)大桶,大缸(尤指染缸)vt.装入大桶,在大桶里处理
examples: Note that the prices are inclusive of VAT.
They do not understand how the VAT works.

Refundable tax credits would offset the regressivity of the VAT for those with low incomes.
